title: Soft & Wet - JCraft datapack
description:
A datapack that adds Soft & Wet from JoJolion over Killer Queen: Bites the Dust
Currently in development
body:
# Soft & Wet for JCraft: Eyes of Ender
> JCraft: Eyes of Ender 0.16.4/0.17.2 is required

### Adds Soft & Wet from JoJolion to the mod over Killer Queen: BTD!
Currently in development.
Changes some of base Killer Queen's sounds

> Credits to "helpimbaguet" on discord for the model and the great animations, truly the GOAT
> Credits to "cyber_bomber24" on discord for ability icons and some other textures

> Use `/stand about` to check out the full moveset
